## Summary
- What changed?
- Why now?

## Scope
- [ ] API
- [ ] Web
- [ ] Infra/CI
- [ ] Docs

## Risk
- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- User-facing impact:
- Data/security impact:

## Verification
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] Manual happy path tested
- Evidence (logs/screenshots/notes):

## Rollback Plan
- Revert commit/PR:
- Feature flag or config fallback:
- Data migration rollback needed? (Yes/No)

## Checklist
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in changes
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
- [ ] Docs updated where needed
